title: [AI5] Apply governance gate before adoption: as an agent client protocol agent over

checks.detail: director-agent.ts: agent client protocol governance via 'policy-governance' capability
broker-agent.ts: command validation and risk scoring for protocol-level operations

summary: Agent client protocol governance gate verified. director-agent.ts registers policy-governance capability. broker-agent.ts enforces protocol-level command validation. scripts/protocols/chronological-dispatch.cjs provides dispatch governance.
